seoDescription: Discover CPMR's national plant medicine research programme — thematic areas, projects, publications, and researcher expertise.
introParagraphs: The Centre for Plant Medicine Research conducts nationally significant scientific inquiry across conservation, cultivation, phytochemistry, laboratory analysis, and evidence-based product development.

Use the pathways below to move from this institutional overview to thematic areas, active projects, scholarly publications, and researcher profiles. Department mini-sites provide additional depth where programmes are hosted.

facilitiesTeaser.title: Research facilities
facilitiesTeaser.body: Laboratories, herbaria, and specialist units that underpin CPMR's scientific work are profiled with capacity notes and public access guidance.

links.label: Research themes
links.description: Thematic entry points for projects and publications when collections are populated.

links.label: Research projects
links.description: Structured project stories with objectives, teams, and linked outputs.

links.label: Publications
links.description: Scholarly publications and reports from CPMR research programmes.

links.label: Research facilities
links.description: Laboratories, herbaria, and specialist units with capacity and access notes.

links.label: Collaboration
links.description: Partnership process and official contact pathway for research enquiries.

links.description: Directory of researchers and scientific staff with department context.
